---
title: "Research"
pagetitle: "Research — Martin Lukk"
subtitle: "Articles, working papers, and a book. Filter by project, or scroll chronologically."
listing:
  id: pubs
  contents: "news/[0-9]*.qmd"
  template: _templates/pub-list.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 100
  categories: false
  feed: false
  fields: [title, pub_title, date, categories, authors, venue, project, doi, pdf, arxiv, code, project_page]
---

{{< include _includes/pub-filter.html >}}

::: {#pubs}
:::
